title: Record: CaseOps Tokenizer + Recurrence Depth Curriculum + Base Arch Stack — val_bpb 1.06505
author: romeerp

data.description: Looped recurrent block trained with a deterministic recurrence-depth curriculum and evaluated at fixed depth 4.
Uses gated attention / quant-gate components from the inherited stack.
Inherited base stack includes tied/shared components from prior work.
CaseOps bijective capitalization transform with original-byte sidecar accounting for BPB on raw UTF-8 bytes.

novel_contributions: Deterministic 1 -> 3 -> 4 recurrence-depth curriculum after loop activation
CaseOps tokenizer with original-byte sidecar BPB accounting
